title: Community
description: How to participate as contributor or early adopter.

sections.title: GitHub repository
sections.body: Explore the source, architecture docs, ADRs, and roadmap in the main repository.

sections.title: Contribution guide
sections.body: Contributions are welcome in architecture, domain modeling, implementation, and documentation.

sections.title: Discussions
sections.body: Use issues and discussions to propose ideas, validate models, and shape roadmap direction in the open.

sections.title: Early adopter interest
sections.body: Families can follow progress and share real operational pain points to guide capability priorities.

sections.title: Roadmap preview
sections.body: Current stages: foundation and model hardening, then expanded domains, then intelligent assistance.
